---
title: Introduction to FHIR® for Research Webinar

toc: false
number-sections: false
---

## Recording

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xli9TIyQm3k >}}

## Slides

-   [PowerPoint format (accessible)](FHIR%20for%20Research%20Webinar%20(508C).pptx)
-   [Accessible PDF](FHIR%20for%20Research%20Webinar%20(508C).pdf)
